---
title: Some R-title
author: Jan
tags: research, r
---

Some intro text.

<div></div><!--more-->

Some more text.

```{r testchunk}
x <- 1:10
y <- round(rnorm(10, x, 1), 2)
df <- data.frame(x, y)
plot(df)
```

The end.

## References

<!-- R --no-restore --no-save -e "library(knitr); knit('test.Rmd');" && pandoc -s -o test.pdf test.md -->
